subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! We have desired to make mention of thee and to console thee in that which hath befallen thee through the decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی اردنا ان نذکرک و نسلیک فی ما ورد علیک من القضاء
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort
